text.tspan: DISTRIBUTED TRACING: one user request becomes a TREE of SPANS
across many services; each span = one unit of work
trace_id (same across all spans for one trace)
parent_span_id (the span that caused this one)
VISUALIZED as a flame graph / waterfall u2192 answers:
'Why was this request slow? Which service / DB call is the long bar?'
'What downstream services were called for THIS request?'
'Did Stripe fail for the affected users?'
